title: Opengit Forge
description: Peer-to-peer code hosting. The repos below are published as a static forge web app — same bundle on the web and at hyper://<key>/ in PearBrowser.

repos.name: opengit
repos.description: A peer-to-peer code forge (this project). Git, issues, PRs — no server.

repos.name: p2p-hiverelay
repos.description: HiveRelay — the persistence / blind-relay backbone that keeps repos available when owners are offline.

repos.name: pearbrowser
repos.description: PearBrowser — a P2P browser; renders opengit:// repos and hyper:// drives.
